reviews.review_description: The game is great. Its fun and relaxing and a great game for me. However it is unfinished and broken. Tons of bugs and if you expand your store even a bit the game drops below 20fps and generally glitchy. My restocker is frozen. Customers keep walking out because some are frozen and get stuck on eachother and i lose xp for it. Like i said the concept is fine but the end product is utter crap. Its been like this for a while so i think the devs gave up on it. Sorry.

The game has good potential, but the devs spend too much time releasing new features and not enough time fixing old ones. There are many bugs when it comes to basic gameplay, like NPCs not leaving the store, for example. However, the devs spend  all their time releasing new features that just bring even more bugs. I would like to see an update that focuses on nothing but patching bugs. After those bugs ae fixed, THEN start working on new stuff.

reviews.review_title: Sadly 1 star for now 😔 Nice game but...
reviews.review_description: Everything is smooth at first but after some upgrades on your shop and more customers to deal with, the game lags too much... Customers stuck on each other, your view is getting laggy all the time, make it impossible to continue the game... I hope devs can fix this, its a great game but for the bugs only cant enjoy it unfortunately.. 😔

I actually really enjoy this game, most of the time I can ignore the lag but sometimes it gets too much. For the developers: PLEASE fix some things JUST for the lag, I wouldn’t focus on new stuff as there’s already a lot to grind out but just fix the lag and FPS issue. No hate though, I love this game and keep up the good work!

I’ve tried reinstalling multiple times but the game gets stuck on the grab shelf which is about 3 minutes into the game and won’t go any further. I’ve tried multiple times on different saves, tried picking the shelf up various different ways but it will not move past it so then you can’t continue the game.

This game has a lot of potential, and I was really enjoying it at first. The core gameplay is quite fun and engaging. Unfortunately, it seems to be plagued by frequent glitches, which really detract from the experience. I'm now a couple of upgrades in, and sadly, it's become unplayable for me. I'm hopeful that future updates can address these issues.

Started off well but bugs coming in thick and fast now. Frame rate <30fps effecting how hard it it to use the till and card machine. And I can only imaging the frame rate will get worse when I expand the shop and have more customers/products. Worst of all, glitchy customers. They stand at the till after having been served. So the next person in line either just stands there or they glitch into the customer in front meaning I can’t serve them. It’s an unplayable glitch so hope it’s sorted before I go off the idea of playing. No way to ask devs for suggestions, unless there’s a discord channel? I’ll happily rate 3 or 4 stars once the bugs are sorted. Can a dev please reply. Thanks

I did give this game 5 stars earlier but now that the game runs at a max 2fps after expanding the size of the store once and having 9 shelves in the store it is completely unplayable and nauseating. I don't know how this game is supposed to run at max store size filled up with shelving but I can't imagine very well. Needs optimization badly.
It is so fun

I just started the game and after i purchased first furniture after about 30seconds of the game it tells me to grab the furniture. I grabbed it and moved it to the store and that was end. Its stuck. The sign grab the furniture stays there and I cant do nothing. Great game....dont waste your tíme or money.
I could not even put down the number of the total  price!        Also I could not stop criminals I could slap them but I could not call anyone I could jut let them steal ￼

like it

But everything else was perfect
Nice game for helping my kids prepare for their first job!

The store simulator is a very good and enjoyable game, but there are some issues I hope you will look into and fix: When customers enter the store, it freezes in place and doesn't move at all after the cashier pays. The movement of the store is very slow and jerky. I also hope you will increase the number of vegetables, fruits, dairy products, and cleaning supplies. Pay close attention to the movement of customers and the cashier, and remove the unnecessary cashiers and replace them with better ones. Thank you.

can you guys update door customers can't walk through when they're getting cluttered through the door which makes nobody entered the door then you have to go to the door and get the cash which everybody clusters up and they don't even come to the cash register or inside of the store can you please fix that i can also put up a video to show

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback! We’re sorry to hear you experienced this issue. We haven’t encountered this problem on our side, so we’d really appreciate it if you could send us a short video showing what’s happening to help us investigate further. You can send it to Contact@knk-studio.com. Thanks for helping us improve!

The tutorial is broken, you can't get any farther after the shelf. So you're stuck and can't do anything. Won't be playing until that's fixed.

1) the screen brightens to the point where you can barely see anything. 
2) the customers are invisible so you cant cash them out.
There's a lot of bugs that need to be fixed before i play this game again
Customers freeze at the door, after paying. They are even layered on top of each other, so no new customers come in. After reading the reviews, it’s just another app with no support.

When I was playing the tutorial, I had to grab a shelf. When I grabbed the shelf, didn't recognize that I grabbed the shelf
Don't recommend buying

I was looking so forward to playing this. When in settings I saw I can choose to snap turn, but forced to use smooth movement I was so bummed because I knew it would make me sick. 
The game is advertised as comfortable. I always look for indications of movement options before buying, but didn't see it say specifically.
 "Comfortable" has always been having the choice of movements in other games I've bought (atleast so far.)
Please please please 🙏 add the option for teleport movements. 
I tried playing by closing my eyes when moving. Hit alot of walls, knocked over stuff and still ended up so sick in about 5 minutes I was sweating bullets, my stomach was so high in my throat I thought my stomach it was going to leave my body. 
I had to get out of the game and the quest altogether ASAP.
This game seems like it could be such fun, if only we had the teleport option for those of us who get motion sick.
I have a few games that warn of it, but aren't that bad.
Sadly, the movement in this one is so intense it made me so sick so fast.
I, and many others I'm sure, would be very grateful for teleport movements so we can enjoy this game too.
I'm scared
Way better than the mobile version
This is fun

The store simulator is a very good and enjoyable game, but there are some issues I hope you will look into and fix: When customers enter the store, it freezes in place and doesn't move at all after the cashier pays. The movement of the store is very slow and jerky. I also hope you will increase the number of vegetables, fruits, dairy products, and cleaning supplies. reviews.review_description: i downloaded this game today and i am already addicted its like all the other supermarket games but its in vr and its so much more immersive. there is a few bugs but it has great potential.

I have found the game to be quite enjoyable for the most part. But there are a few bugs that make it very difficult to play the game sometimes. Like how all products reset to the recommended price when you reload a save. So you have to change the prices every time you reload the game. Or how when you order to many things at once there's a chance they get shot across the world and you can't find them. There are a few other minor bugs that don't pose a huge problem but are just tedious to deal with. All in all I think for the alpha the game is in a good place and I hope that the next updates comes out soon because having cashiers and restockers will be very helpful.

developer_response.body: We are working on fixing all of these, thank you!

Game is stuck on grab shelf. Don't buy!!!!!!!!!!!please respond and fix the flaw instead of collecting money for no product.  The game works well on switch but no access on vr

I honestly have had a good experience with this game by reading previous comments on here so I knew what to expect.  Loading the shelves goes smoothly if your movements have a good flow.
My only complaint is some customers play try and take the card/cash with moving away when you try and retrieve payment, resulting on me coming out of the cashier's table ready to throw hands.  
Oh and that escaped prisoner has startled me more than once .... Storage unit don't have any hiding spots so the cops don't catch him.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the great feedback, we have been working really hard behind the scenes and have address a lot of the bugs previously reported. We still have aways to go but we are still working!

I know that’s a lot  but just keep working, upgrading and updating this game. It is all fun but I will onlay give 4 stars because of the bugs and unrealistic gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed review! We really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. 

We’ll certainly take all of your suggestions into consideration as we continue to refine the game, everything from full-body animations, collision improvements, sprint mechanics, better shelving and shopping tools, to bug fixes and more realistic interactions at the checkout.

Your feedback helps us prioritize what matters most to players, and we’re already hard at work planning these updates. Stay tuned for the next release, we can’t wait to show you what’s coming! 

Thanks again for the four-star rating and your honest insights. We hope to earn that fifth star soon!

The boxes spaz out and go flying everywhere with the slightest touch.  The shelves somehow move themselves and become inactive on occasion because they sank into the wall or floor.  The game gets laggy and makes it nearly impossible to enter the correct amount into the credit card machine.  The open/closed sign should be inside the store, not where you have to climb a ladder outside.  The delivery truck shouldn't dump deliveries all over town.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed feedback! We're currently working on improving the physics of boxes and shelves to prevent them from glitching or becoming inactive. Optimization is also a priority in the next update to reduce lag and improve overall performance, especially for interactions like the card machine. We're also considering adding an indoor switch for opening and closing the store to make it more convenient, and we’re improving the delivery system so products stay where they should. We appreciate your patience and support as we continue polishing the game!
